response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including C, C++, D, JavaScript/TypeScript), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or enterprise-scale feature flagging infrastructure — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) demonstrating initiative and systems thinking
Proven ability to work across languages and stacks (C, C++, D, JS/TS, Java) with hands-on production delivery
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into statistical analysis, bias detection, or risk controls in experimentation — core to the role
Experience with AI tools is mentioned vaguely (AI-agent infrastructure) without depth or impact metrics
